instructions: Hand the vertical rod from one gripper to the other.
Pass the upright rod from your left hand to your right hand.
Transfer the vertically oriented rod between your two grippers.
Grasp the vertical rod and hand it over to the other gripper.
Pick up the upright rod and pass it to the opposite end-effector.
Perform a vertical handover of the rod from one arm to the other.
Move the standing rod from the initial gripper to the other one.
With the rod held vertically, transfer it from one hand to the other.
Complete a handover of the vertically held rod between grippers.
Grab the vertical rod with one gripper and deliver it to the other.
